goal: v3.2.0 trust-chain release: close the enforcement inversion (CI pinned-copy anchor, stop-gate decision table, --require-terminal), repair the evidence base (honest 5-eval table, model-proxy relabels, 122-case count sync, trigger smoke reclassification), instrument process cost (bench validation, run_metrics), dedupe docs and reposition orchestration, extract quality_loop_core
acceptance_criteria: AC1 (R1): action.yml executes gate scripts only from ${GITHUB_ACTION_PATH}; a red-team eval case proves a softened committed local script no longer defeats verification
AC2 (R1): stop_gate blocks at status verify/review with a dirty tree and failing gates; allows escalate as auditable pause; allows stop_hook_active; package/done behavior unchanged
AC3 (R1): verify --require-terminal fails on non-empty diff with non-terminal status

AC4 (R2/R4): README lists all five eval runs with methodology labels and negatives; trigger suite excluded from gate count and labeled smoke; all docs state the same gate-case count, enforced by a lint case
AC5 (R3): bench validates cost_usd/tokens_in/tokens_out/duration_sec on live runs, hard-fail; record schema accepts optional run_metrics
AC6 (R6/R7): references deduped with canonical pointers, medium unified, advisor-topology decision rule present, v240 archived with pointers updated, cursor alwaysApply off
AC7 (R8): quality_loop_core.py extracted, heterogeneity logic single-sourced, dead phase machinery removed, all suites green
non_goals: R5 per-model process depth (deferred: needs n>=3 live replication)
npm publish mechanics beyond tagging a release
implementer: claude-fable-5 supervisor + subagents (s1-enforcement, s2-scripts, s3-evidence, s4-docs, s5-bench)
verification_plan: all 6 suite runners + static eval-cases green (122 gate cases + 10 trigger smoke)
fresh-context quality review + security review + codex adversarial review, findings fixed
verify umbrella with --require-terminal passes on this record at package

validation_contract.goal: v3.2.0 trust-chain release: close the enforcement inversion (CI pinned-copy anchor, stop-gate decision table, --require-terminal), repair the evidence base (honest 5-eval table, model-proxy relabels, 122-case count sync, trigger smoke reclassification), instrument process cost (bench validation, run_metrics), dedupe docs and reposition orchestration, extract quality_loop_core
acceptance_criteria: all seven ACs above hold, each backed by a runnable command or a file:line check
evidence: python3 evals/run_evals.py -> 38/38 (incl. count-consistency lint, run_metrics, require-terminal, bench-validate cases)
python3 evals/run_hook_evals.py -> 15/15 (incl. unreadable-record fail-closed, reasonless-escalated block)
python3 evals/run_reality_evals.py -> 22/22 (incl. CI-anchor red-team + action-pinning lint)

findings: resolved: README:215 + :499 breakdown now 11/39/26/23/15/16 = 130, arithmetic verified
resolved: CHANGELOG 4.1.0 states 130 across 6 suites with correct breakdown; 'version markers unified on 4.1.0'
resolved: dashboard PNG and generator source and README alt text all agree at 130 / Hook 16 (PNG visually verified)
resolved: retrospect merge seam closed — retrospect in DIRTY_GATED_STATUSES + case_stop_gate_blocks_retrospect_dirty (hook 16/16); coherent with require-terminal treating retrospect as non-terminal
resolved: count lint extended to docs/images/src/README.md + CHANGELOG top entry (10-case fixture whitelisted); _REVIEW_READY_STATUS aliased to core REVIEW_READY_STATUSES
resolved: CHANGELOG references measurement corrected to 65,869 -> 62,982 (-4.4%) vs shipped 4.0.0 baseline, with the branch-lineage -12.6% kept as labeled context
resolved: CHANGELOG module sizes corrected to quality_loop.py 1,833 -> 1,693 vs shipped 4.0.0 baseline
independent_review.verification_assessment: ran_checks=true. Executed on the reconciled staged tree: py_compile clean; 11 static + 39 behavioral + 26 memory + 23 reality + 15 routing + 16 hook = 130 gate cases green, matching CANONICAL_GATE_CASES=130 and every linted doc; 10/10 trigger smoke; bench fixture + --validate; check-config against EXPECTED_CONFIG_VERSION=4.1.0; dashboard PNG visually inspected at 130/16. Merge semantics verified across both streams: classifier removal, table-driven tier rules, _reviewer_heterogeneity, advisory/blocking diff-audit, _resolve_base fallback (behavior-equivalent via qlcore.git_capture) from 4.0.0; core extraction, --require-terminal, run_metrics, test_weakening_hits as blocking, stop-gate decision table, action.yml pinning/env-hardening from trust-chain. RETROSPECT constants byte-equivalent to shipped 4.0.0 literal sets. Config example semantically identical to 4.0.0's except version (deep-compared). Final round: CHANGELOG-only edit verified (both numbers match my own measurements exactly, fully staged, no other file touched); behavioral 39/39 (count lint included) and hook 16/16 re-run green; py_compile clean.
independent_review.minimality_assessment: Reconciliation is the smallest correct union: no behavior invented outside either stream; the only new surface since my last pass (retrospect dirty-gating, lint extension, alias) each answers a named reviewer finding with a pinning eval. Config reformat is cosmetic churn (verified semantics-identical) — acceptable.

probes: invalid-UTF8 record at done+dirty -> fail-closed block, no traceback
escalated + non-empty reason -> allow; whitespace-only reason -> blocked via dirty gate
action.yml script body: zero ${{ }} interpolations (env indirection verified)
record-deletion: action fails ::error when loop config present without record
accepted_residuals: git-absent fail-open in stop hook (documented; CI anchor holds)
reasonless escalated + clean tree allows (nothing shipped; require-terminal blocks merge)
local hook executes checkout scripts (by design; pinned CI copy is the anchor, eval-pinned)

evidence: 130/130 gate cases green across 6 suites (11+39+26+23+15+16) + 10/10 trigger smoke on the reconciled tree
reconciliation merge onto shipped 4.0.0: quality reviewer verified both streams' semantics preserved, nothing dropped (attested, base origin/main)
security reviewer: approve — merge-seam finding (retrospect dirty-gating) fixed and probe-proven; corrupt-record fail-closed re-verified
Codex merge-loss verdict: no runtime behavior lost from either parent, nothing widened; all doc-truth findings fixed
red-team eval replays the documented soften-and-commit attack; pinned CI copy blocks it
completion_record.rollback: git revert the single release merge commit on main; npm: deprecate 4.1.0 and re-point latest at 4.0.0

callers_checked: scripts/install.py:66 glob quality_loop*.py -> ships core module
patterns_to_follow: finding strings are load-bearing (eval cases assert on them)
JSON decision output for Claude Code hooks

minimality_decision.reason: every change lands in existing surfaces (action.yml, stop hook, scripts, docs); the only new file is quality_loop_core.py, extracted (not invented) to break the documented god-module coupling; R5's new config surface deliberately deferred

plan: S1 enforcement trust chain (action.yml, stop_gate, red-team + hook eval cases)
S2 core extraction + heterogeneity dedupe + dead phase removal + run_metrics + --require-terminal
S3 evidence-base repair + count sync + trigger smoke reclassification
S4 references dedup + orchestration reposition + philosophy fix + hygiene
supervisor: README/comparison positioning, seam fixes, init-record nesting fix
review swarm + dogfood verify + release v3.2.0

commands_run.cmd: python3 -m py_compile scripts/quality_loop.py scripts/quality_loop_core.py scripts/quality_loop_memory.py scripts/quality_loop_reality.py scripts/quality_loop_routing.py

open_risks: R5 (per-model process depth) deferred to ROADMAP pending n>=3 live replication with cost capture
references dedup landed -12.6% vs -40% aspiration; accepted deviation, recorded in CHANGELOG
stop gate allows implement-status stops with dirty tree by design (interactive turns); CI --require-terminal is the merge-boundary backstop; accepted
git-absent environments fail open in the stop hook by design (session must not lock); documented in code
GH Action pinning verified by local red-team simulation + static lint, not by a real Actions run

diff-audit leaves an unreadable untracked file as advisory (cannot be scanned for secrets); accepted residual per security review — an untracked file never ships, and staging it enters the blocking patch scan
review_findings: fresh-context quality review (quality-loop-reviewer): approve, attested diff_sha256 f58fb7f9...913; 8 findings resolved or explicitly accepted
fresh-context security review (quality-loop-security-reviewer): approve, zero findings, six adversarial probes incl. corrupt-record fail-closed and whitespace-reason evasion
independent Codex/GPT-5.5 review: 5 findings (require-terminal base no-op, stop-gate crash guard, escalate/escalated, stale docs counts, phase doc drift) — all fixed and re-verified
escalation_reason: Awaiting reviewer re-attest: the quality reviewer approved the reconciled v4.1.0 tree, then requested two CHANGELOG baseline corrections; applying them invalidated the attest hash by design. The refreshed attest against the staged diff (base origin/main) is the only open gate before merge+tag. Security: approve (probe-proven). Codex: clean merge-loss verdict, all findings fixed. Battery: 130 gate cases + 10 smoke green.
